spec_match.rationale: Highly creative developer utility that parses legacy callback-based MSE code and converts it to sequentially-awaited Promise queues.

interactive.rationale: Highly interactive playground with preloaded race and sequence examples, a live compiler/regex parser, and side-by-side editor blocks.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Excellent explanation of use-counters, warning signs, and long-term MSE stability reasons.

edge_cases.rationale: Clearly notes that it acts as an offline utility, avoiding runtime crashes and gracefully managing input parsing.

references.rationale: Includes valid ChromeStatus spec reference links.

design_system.rationale: Uses standard design margins and layout elements seamlessly.

summary: A brilliantly designed code transformer utility that solves a genuine developer pain-point: rewriting obsolete callback/event-listener MSE buffer chaining into clean, linear, sequentially-awaited Promise wrappers. Flawless conformance.
